scripts.reset:insforge: bunx insforge storage delete-bucket assets -y && bun run insforge:bucket && bunx insforge db query "delete from cafe_media;"
scripts.sync:insforge: find assets -type f ! -name manifest.json ! -name .DS_Store -exec sh -c 'for file do handle=$(basename "$(dirname "$file")"); base=$(basename "$file"); post=${base#post-}; post=${post%%-*}; ext=${base##*.}; key="$handle-post-$post.$ext"; bunx insforge storage upload "$file" --bucket assets --key "$key"; done' sh {} +
scripts.sync:insforge-all: bun run reset:insforge && bun run sync:insforge && bun run sync:insforge-media
